hero.badge: NEW - Version 2.5 - Faster, smarter, more complete
hero.titleLine2: the dashboard that adapts to your business.
hero.subtitle: The adaptable operating system for your business. Manage your schedule, clients, team, finances, inventory and automations in a single unified platform.

target.title: Who is AuraDash for?
target.subtitle: Adapts to any appointment-based business.
target.c1Desc: Salons, barbershops, spas, nail salons, aesthetics.
target.c4Desc: Cleaning, maintenance, repairs, fitness, personal trainers.

explorer.title: Everything you need, in one place
explorer.subtitle: 8 integrated modules to manage and grow your business.

dashboard.title: Main Dashboard & Business Metrics
dashboard.bullet1: Consolidated view of revenue, active appointments and monthly performance.
dashboard.bullet2: Interactive charts of net sales and operational speed.
dashboard.bullet3: Quick access to daily tasks and critical system alerts.

agenda.title: Smart Schedule & Aura AI Copilot
agenda.bullet1: Multi-view calendar by collaborator with drag and drop.
agenda.bullet2: Integrated smart waitlist that fills cancellations instantly.
agenda.bullet3: Time blocking, recurring appointments and color-coded statuses.

clients.title: Client CRM & Clinical Records/History
clients.bullet1: Unified database with contact details, balances and notes.
clients.bullet2: Complete history of visits, booked services and billing.
clients.bullet3: Custom fields adapted to the specific needs of your sector.

team.title: Collaborators, Schedules & Commissions
team.bullet1: Individual configuration of working hours, breaks and vacations.
team.bullet2: Automated calculation of commissions for services and sales.
team.bullet3: Permissions and roles (RBAC) to limit access based on position.

finance.title: Daily Cash, Cash Flows & Closings
finance.bullet1: Opening and closing of secure daily cash registers with auditing.
finance.bullet2: Detailed log of income (card, cash, transfer) and expenses.
finance.bullet3: Quick reconciliation module to prevent deviations or losses.

inventory.title: Inventory & Stock Control
inventory.bullet1: Batch control (FIFO) and expiration dates for supplies.
inventory.bullet2: Automatic consumption rules for performed services.
inventory.bullet3: Automatic replenishment orders and low stock alerts.

flows.title: Task Automation & Workflows
flows.bullet1: Visual canvas to connect automatic actions based on events.
flows.bullet2: Automated reminders via WhatsApp and email.
flows.bullet3: Dynamic parameterized templates with client and appointment variables.

integrations.title: Limitless Connectivity & Webhooks
integrations.bullet1: Native connection with payment gateways like Mercado Pago and Stripe.
integrations.bullet2: Two-way sync with Google Calendar and Google Sheets.
integrations.bullet3: Outgoing webhooks and API integration to connect any external ERP.

settings.title: Field Catalog & Global Settings
settings.bullet1: Visual builder for custom fields (text, numbers, dates).
settings.bullet2: Customization of business profile, currencies and time zones.
settings.bullet3: Configuration of cancellation policies and online bookings.

aiCopilot.title: Aura AI Copilot
aiCopilot.subtitle: Your 24/7 business advisor
aiCopilot.desc: Aura AI analyzes your information and delivers alerts, recommendations and actionable insights so you can make better decisions.

bullets.b1Desc: e.g., Clients who haven't returned in over 45 days.
bullets.b2Desc: e.g., Low stock, low revenue, frequent no-shows.
bullets.b3Desc: e.g., What promotions to launch, what to improve, what to automate.

sandbox.title: How can I help you today?
sandbox.p1: How are my sales doing this week?
sandbox.p2: Clients who haven't returned in a long time

steps.title: Start in minutes, grow without limits
steps.s1Desc: Create your account and set up your business in a few steps.
steps.s2Desc: Bring your clients, services or inventory from Excel.
steps.s3Desc: Start booking appointments and managing your daily operations.
steps.s4Desc: Activate reminders, payments, integrations and more.
steps.s5Desc: Get real-time metrics and make your business grow.

pricing.title: Simple plans, clear pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your business size.
pricing.footnote: Free 14-day trial • No credit card required • Cancel anytime

comparison.title: Fewer tools. More results.
comparison.desc: AuraDash replaces multiple expensive tools and gives you everything you need to manage and grow your business from a single place.

ctaFooter.title: Your business can grow more. We give you control.
ctaFooter.subtitle: Join more than 1,200 businesses that already use AuraDash to manage, improve and sell more.

howItWorks.title: How does AuraDash work?
howItWorks.subtitle: Explore the power of your new business management tool.

step1.title: 360° Main Dashboard
step1.desc: Unified command center that shows live operational speed, total active clients and the automation log.

step2.title: Multi-collaborator Agenda
step2.desc: Smart calendar with color codes, drag and drop, and a high-conversion waitlist.

step3.title: CRM and Clinical History
step3.desc: Centralizes your clients' data, their debts, and custom profiles with editable dynamic fields.

step4.title: Collaborators and Commissions
step4.desc: Manage your team's shifts, automatically calculate their monthly commissions, and define their security roles.

step5.title: Financial Control and Cash Register
step5.desc: Record income and expenses, open and close daily cash shifts with exact reconciliation to prevent losses.

step6.title: Automation Center
step6.desc: Create automated flows such as: 'Upon collecting deposit -> Send WhatsApp confirmation and register in Google Sheets'.

step7.title: Payment Connections and Integrations
step7.desc: Integrate gateways like Mercado Pago, sync Google Calendar and export your data via APIs or webhooks.

step8.title: Custom Tailored Fields
step8.desc: Create and configure custom fields (medical histories, preferences, attachments) to adapt AuraDash to your industry.

liveDemo.title: See AuraDash in action
liveDemo.desc: Discover how each module works in a guided interactive tour.

testimonial.quote: AuraDash completely changed the way we manage our salon. We now have more clients and fewer no-shows.

financeResponse.message: This week's sales are up 18.5% compared to the monthly average. Excellent performance.

workflowResponse.message: Automated workflows have notified clients with pending appointments today via WhatsApp.

agendaResponse.message: Average occupancy for today is 78%. You have 3 open slots in the afternoon.
